---
name: Theme Request
about: Suggest a new theme pack
title: "[Theme Request] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Theme Idea

What theme would you like to see? (e.g., a specific show, game, aesthetic)

## Category

Which category would it fit in? (gaming, trek, scifi, retro, cultural, seasonal, minimal)

## Description

Describe the visual identity you envision:

- **Color scheme:** (dark/light, primary colors, mood)
- **Banner art:** (any ideas for ASCII art)
- **Companion personality:** (what kind of AI persona fits this theme)

## References

Links to visual references, screenshots, or inspiration:

## Would you like to contribute this theme?

- [ ] Yes, I plan to submit a PR
- [ ] No, just a suggestion
